blocks.content: She was good at school. She took notes, answered questions, smiled at the right moments.
Kit found her between second and third period.
He was coming from B-wing, she was going toward C, and they met at the junction. She saw it on his face immediately.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: I'm going to be late, Kit.
She kept walking. He let her go, and she made it all the way to C-wing into her seat before the bell, opened her notebook to a blank page, and stared at it.
The teacher said something. She wrote it down.
